TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Michelle Bachelet = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 9 jiyax 29 ka Michelle Bachelet ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Chile ta sayang o kiya ka Michelle Bachelet, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 3 jiyax 11 pnrajing kmlawa klwa Michelle Bachelet (kari Spain: Ver√≥nica Michelle Bachelet Jeria, kngkawas1951 idas 9 diyax 29Ôľć), Seyji Jnwu Chile, mn2 ngalan Soto Chile, kiya ka tu1 qridin Soto Chile uri, mniq kngkawas 2005 mi kngkawas 2013 mn2 mbiyax mangal Soto. Michelle Bachelet(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Ver√≥nica Michelle Bachelet Jeria,1951ŚĻī9śúą29śó•Ôľć) Quri kndusan niyaÁĒüŚĻ≥ŤÉĆśôĮ Michelle Bachelet pa tama tama rudan niya u snpeyyah France mpbari sinaw lipas, kngkawas 1860 cida tama tama rudan mi bubu tama rudan niya Michelle Bachelet pa miyah thdil Chile. Michelle Bachelet mntuting Chile sotu San Diego. Tama niya ka Chile brah Soto Salvador Allende na muryaw Aerbeituo Bachelet Kongcyun Sawcyang, bubu niya ka Kawku Sweycya. Kngkawas 1970 cida, mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Yisweysi muyas ka Michelle Bachelet, mntna kngkawas tumal Tuiwil Pay na Chile Syakay Tang, ngalan mpdudul mpuyas mi pssli mpuyas undo. Kngkawas 1973 cida, Tunarac Heytay Augustus Pinochet ka dmudul heytay pspaux seyhu mi mangal biyax seyhu daw, tama Michelle Bachelet u wada shmuk sapah kung, wada phqilun mniq kcka sapah kung. Kngkawas 1975 cida Michelle Bachelet mi bubu niya u wada qrapun seyhu heytay cingpaw ciko, phmkuwan 2 iyax sngayan, ddha dha bubu niya bukuy daw qduriq musa Australia, pqqiri dhuq Germany (Doicu), kiya u mniq Berlin Pyasan Tubeyhing Hongpaw lmutuc muyas yiswey. Kngkawas 1979 tbrinah qnlhangan daw, lmutuc muyas Dungan ka Michelle Bachelet. Mniq iyax kngkawas 1996 dhuq kngkawas 1998 cida, wada mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Pnhyuwan Qnlhangan Seyji Mi Canrwey Keyngkyo Sweyweyn muyas snlhayan cyuns ka Michelle Bachelet. Kndusan niya seyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į Kngkawas 1990, Chile Seyhu Heytay u wada dha subway ssediq ka biyax seyhu daw, Michelle Bachelet brah mi bukuy u mniq Tkcka iwil pay Minsweyn seyhu na Weysngbu Mi Kwohwangbu ngalan Komung. Kngkawas 2000 cida, Michelle Bachelet u ngalan Weysngbu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2002 cida, Michelle Bachelet u wada ngalan mwaya bay Kwohwangbu Bucyo qnlhangan Chile. Tumn1 Soto: Kngkawas 2006-2010. Kngkawas 2006 idas 1 diyax 16 mniq kcka tumn2 Soto Seyngkyo, Michelle Bachelet pa wada niya ini baka ka npnsung hiya nTunarac Palic na Sebastian Pinella, wada mtaxa tu1 mwaya balay, Latin America Tu3 qridin Minsweyn Soto. Michelle Bachelet u mniq idas 3 diyax 11 psdhuwan phiyu Soto, 4 knkawas ka diyax iyax qpahun, mniq kngkawas 2010 idas 3 diyax 11 malix qpahun. Mniq malix qpahun cida ka Michelle Bachelet pa, wada mangal hmrinas 80% ka dnkuhan ryu niya. Kngkawas 2010 idas 2 diyax 27, mniq Michelle Bachelet malix qpahun brah mkpiya iyax sngayan cida, muda Knbeyhing Bay Runu Kngkawas 2010 ka pspuruq. Michelle Bachelet mniq kngkawas 2015 Iyappel runu babaw mnuda 1 diyax daw musa homung nniqan qnlqilan. UN Biyax Qqridin Su Kngkawas 2010 idas, UN Misucang Ban Ki moon psdhu Michelle Bachelet ngalan UN Biyax Qridin Su mpseykinin niya. Mntxal tumal Soto Seyngkyo Pusu tyawmu: Kngkawas 2013 Knbeyhing Seyngkyo Chile. Pusu tyawmu: Kngkawas 2013 Knbeyhing Seyngkyo Chile. Kngkawas 2013 spuda dnlulan Tukcka iwil pay, Michelle Bachelet u mntxal tumal Soto seyngkyo. Michelle Bachelet u mniq tumn1 meytaq hyo u ya bay 47% hyo mi muda tumn2 meytaq hyo Dungan, kiya mi mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo cida mangal 62% hyo mi mbiyax mangal Soto. Kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 11, mniq Chile tu2 knbeyhing alang mkbrnux Valparaiso psdhuwan phiyu Soto, mntumal pnsdhu niya u Peru,Ecuador,Mexico, Argentina ,Colombia,Uruguay mi Brazil na qbukung Qnlhangan Weynso uxay daw dayhyo seyhu, kiya ka Chinese Kwocya Cusi Xinjiang Tes, Cyawtong Yunsubu Bucyo Yang. Kngkawas 2015 idas 10 diyax 23 cida, Michelle Bachelet u tuhuy Italian Congri Matteo Renzi mtqita dqras. UN Jncweyn Jimu Kawci Cwanweyn Kngkawas 2018 idas 8 cida, UN u pusa hangan mi psdhu Michelle Bachelet ngalan UN Jncweyn Jimu Kawci Cwanweyn. Kngkawas 2018 idas 9 diyax 10, Michelle Bachelet u dmudu China na kwancaweyn mtmay Xinjiang, kiyami snquri ddaun hiya sblhbun balay. Rmngaw ka Michelle Bachelet pa: 'Pnsliyan UN Jncweyn' u wada ptura pkla Uighur mi duma Muslims u wada phmkuwan kcka Xinjiang Nanminying, smatang ku musa ini biyaw muda pprngaw sediq mpririh seyhu Cyokoku muda mpprngaw ddaun.' Kiya mi Cyokoku u muda pkla kari spruwi qmita ka dmnuwi pusu biyax niya. Kngkawas 2018 idas 9, Michelle Bachelet u wada smriq rmngaw dndulan Sartre u muda pddayak uuda Yemen. Pusa kari ka Michelle Bachelet snquri Saudi Arabia pnquri quri Yemen ssediq muda qmada puniq kndadax baraw na sediq muda seykining. Kngkawas 2015 idas 10 diyax 23 cida, Michelle Bachelet u tuhuy Italian Congri Matteo Renzi mtqita dqras. Kndusan niyaŚÄčšļļÁĒüśīĽ Brah snaw niya Michelle Bachelet ka Jorge Leopoldo D√°valos Cartes, ddha dha u wada ini supu mniq mi ptalax da, Michelle Bachelet u niqan 1 laqi snaw mi 2 laqi qridin niya. Michelle Bachelet pa uxay wana kari Spain ka klaun niya, klaun niya ka kari English mi kari German mi kari French mi kari Portuguese uri. Michelle Bachelet pa snkuxul inggaku mi muyas mi paycyo undo uri. Papak

pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwa mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt (ka…ĺi spain: *…ô…ĺ*ni ¶a mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt …ü…ô…ĺia, kŇčkawas**** idas * dijax ***), s…ô…üi …ünwu ¶ńßil…ô, mn* Ňčalan soto ¶ńßil…ô, kija ka tu* q…ĺidin soto ¶ńßil…ô u…ĺi, mniq kŇčkawas **** mi kŇčkawas **** mn* mbijax maŇčal soto. mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt(****:*…ô…ĺ*ni ¶a mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt …ü…ô…ĺia,***********) qu…ĺi kndusan nija**** mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt pa tama tama …ĺudan nija u snp…ôjańß *…ĺan ¶…ô mpba…ĺi sinaw lipas, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida tama tama …ĺudan mi bubu tama …ĺudan nija mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt pa mijańß tńßdil ¶ńßil…ô. mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt mntutiŇč ¶ńßil…ô sotu san di…ôgo. tama nija ka ¶ńßil…ô b…ĺańß soto sal*ado…ĺ all…ônd…ô na mu…ĺjaw a…ô…ĺb…ôituo ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt koŇč ¶jun saw ¶jaŇč, bubu nija ka kawku sw…ô ¶ja. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, mtmaj pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč jisw…ôsi mujas ka mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt, mntna kŇčkawas tumal tuiwil paj na ¶ńßil…ô sjakaj taŇč, Ňčalan mpdudul mpujas mi pssli mpujas undo. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, tuna…ĺa ¶ ńß…ôtaj augustus pino ¶ńß…ôt ka dmudul ńß…ôtaj pspaux s…ôńßu mi maŇčal bijax s…ôńßu daw, tama mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u wada sńßmuk sapańß kuŇč, wada pńßqilun mniq k ¶ka sapańß kuŇč. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt mi bubu nija u wada q…ĺapun s…ôńßu ńß…ôtaj ¶iŇčpaw ¶iko, pńßmkuwan * ijax sŇčajan, ddńßa dńßa bubu nija bukuj daw qdu…ĺiq musa aust…ĺalia, pqqi…ĺi dńßuq g…ô…ĺmanj (doi ¶u), kija u mniq b…ô…ĺlin pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ńßoŇčpaw lmutu ¶ mujas jisw…ô. kŇčkawas **** tb…ĺinańß qnlńßaŇčan daw, lmutu ¶ mujas duŇčan ka mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt. mniq ijax kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, wada mniq pjasan sw…ôw…ôn pnńßjuwan qnlńßaŇčan s…ô…üi mi ¶an…ĺw…ô k…ôŇčkjo sw…ôw…ôn mujas snlńßajan ¶juns ka mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt. kndusan nija s…ô…üi**** kŇčkawas ****, ¶ńßil…ô s…ôńßu ńß…ôtaj u wada dńßa subwaj ss…ôdiq ka bijax s…ôńßu daw, mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt b…ĺańß mi bukuj u mniq tk ¶ka iwil paj minsw…ôn s…ôńßu na w…ôsŇčbu mi kwońßwaŇčbu Ňčalan komuŇč. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u Ňčalan w…ôsŇčbu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u wada Ňčalan mwaja baj kwońßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo qnlńßaŇčan ¶ńßil…ô. tumn* soto: kŇčkawas ****-****. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mniq k ¶ka tumn* soto s…ôŇčkjo, mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt pa wada nija ini baka ka npnsuŇč ńßija ntuna…ĺa ¶ pali ¶ na s…ôbastian pin…ôlla, wada mtaxa tu* mwaja balaj, latin am…ô…ĺi ¶a tu* q…ĺidin minsw…ôn soto. mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u mniq idas * dijax ** psdńßuwan pńßiju soto, * knkawas ka dijax ijax qpańßun, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** malix qpańßun. mniq malix qpańßun ¶ida ka mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt pa, wada maŇčal ńßm…ĺinas **% ka dnkuńßan …ĺju nija. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, mniq mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt malix qpańßun b…ĺańß mkpija ijax sŇčajan ¶ida, muda knb…ôńßiŇč baj …ĺunu kŇčkawas **** ka pspu…ĺuq. mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt mniq kŇčkawas **** ijapp…ôl …ĺunu babaw mnuda * dijax daw musa ńßomuŇč nniqan qnlqilan. un bijax qq…ĺidin su kŇčkawas **** idas, un misu ¶aŇč ban ki moon psdńßu mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt Ňčalan un bijax q…ĺidin su mps…ôkinin nija. mntxal tumal soto s…ôŇčkjo pusu tjawmu: kŇčkawas **** knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ńßil…ô. pusu tjawmu: kŇčkawas **** knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ńßil…ô. kŇčkawas **** spuda dnlulan tuk ¶ka iwil paj, mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u mntxal tumal soto s…ôŇčkjo. mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u mniq tumn* m…ôtaq ńßjo u ja baj **% ńßjo mi muda tumn* m…ôtaq ńßjo duŇčan, kija mi mniq tumn* ¶uado…ĺ,m…ôxi ¶o, a…ĺg…ôntina , ¶olombia,u…ĺuguaj mi b…ĺa*il na qbukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan w…ônso uxaj daw dajńßjo s…ôńßu, kija ka ¶ńßin…ôs…ô kwo ¶ja ¶usi xin…üiaŇč t…ôs, ¶jawtoŇč junsubu bu ¶jo jaŇč. ddaun ńßija sblńßbun balaj. …ĺmŇčaw ka mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt pa: 'pnslijan un …ün ¶w…ôn' u wada ptu…ĺa pkla uigńßu…ĺ mi duma muslims u wada pńßmkuwan k ¶ka xin…üiaŇč nanminjiŇč, smataŇč ku musa ini bijaw muda pp…ĺŇčaw s…ôdiq mp…ĺi…ĺińß s…ôńßu ¶jokoku muda mpp…ĺŇčaw ddaun.' kija mi ¶jokoku u muda pkla ka…ĺi sp…ĺuwi qmita ka dmnuwi pusu bijax nija. kŇčkawas **** idas *, mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u wada sm…ĺiq …ĺmŇčaw dndulan sa…ĺt…ĺ…ô u muda pddajak uuda j…ôm…ôn. pusa ka…ĺi ka mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt snqu…ĺi saudi a…ĺabia pnqu…ĺi qu…ĺi j…ôm…ôn ss…ôdiq muda qmada puniq kndadax ba…ĺaw na s…ôdiq muda s…ôkiniŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** ¶ida, mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô ba ¶ńß…ôl…ôt u tuńßuj italian ¶oŇč…ĺi matt…ôo …ĺ…ôn*i mtqita dq…ĺas. kndusan nija**** b…ĺańß snaw nija mi ¶ńß…ôll…ô undo u…ĺi. papak
S.FORM: = Michelle Bachelet = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 9 jiyax 29 ka Michelle Bachelet ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Chile ta sayang o kiya ka Michelle Bachelet, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 3 jiyax 11 pnrajing kmlawa klwa Michelle Bachelet (kari Spain: Ver√≥nica Michelle Bachelet Jeria, kngkawas1951 idas 9 diyax 29Ôľć), Seyji Jnwu Chile, mn2 ngalan Soto Chile, kiya ka tu1 qridin Soto Chile uri, mniq kngkawas 2005 mi kngkawas 2013 mn2 mbiyax mangal Soto. Michelle Bachelet(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Ver√≥nica Michelle Bachelet Jeria,1951ŚĻī9śúą29śó•Ôľć) Quri kndusan niyaÁĒüŚĻ≥ŤÉĆśôĮ Michelle Bachelet pa tama tama rudan niya u snpeyyah France mpbari sinaw lipas, kngkawas 1860 cida tama tama rudan mi bubu tama rudan niya Michelle Bachelet pa miyah thdil Chile. Michelle Bachelet mntuting Chile sotu San Diego. Tama niya ka Chile brah Soto Salvador Allende na muryaw Aerbeituo Bachelet Kongcyun Sawcyang, bubu niya ka Kawku Sweycya. Kngkawas 1970 cida, mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Yisweysi muyas ka Michelle Bachelet, mntna kngkawas tumal Tuiwil Pay na Chile Syakay Tang, ngalan mpdudul mpuyas mi pssli mpuyas undo. Kngkawas 1973 cida, Tunarac Heytay Augustus Pinochet ka dmudul heytay pspaux seyhu mi mangal biyax seyhu daw, tama Michelle Bachelet u wada shmuk sapah kung, wada phqilun mniq kcka sapah kung. Kngkawas 1975 cida Michelle Bachelet mi bubu niya u wada qrapun seyhu heytay cingpaw ciko, phmkuwan 2 iyax sngayan, ddha dha bubu niya bukuy daw qduriq musa Australia, pqqiri dhuq Germany (Doicu), kiya u mniq Berlin Pyasan Tubeyhing Hongpaw lmutuc muyas yiswey. Kngkawas 1979 tbrinah qnlhangan daw, lmutuc muyas Dungan ka Michelle Bachelet. Mniq iyax kngkawas 1996 dhuq kngkawas 1998 cida, wada mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Pnhyuwan Qnlhangan Seyji Mi Canrwey Keyngkyo Sweyweyn muyas snlhayan cyuns ka Michelle Bachelet. Kndusan niya seyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į Kngkawas 1990, Chile Seyhu Heytay u wada dha subway ssediq ka biyax seyhu daw, Michelle Bachelet brah mi bukuy u mniq Tkcka iwil pay Minsweyn seyhu na Weysngbu Mi Kwohwangbu ngalan Komung. Kngkawas 2000 cida, Michelle Bachelet u ngalan Weysngbu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2002 cida, Michelle Bachelet u wada ngalan mwaya bay Kwohwangbu Bucyo qnlhangan Chile. Tumn1 Soto: Kngkawas 2006-2010. Kngkawas 2006 idas 1 diyax 16 mniq kcka tumn2 Soto Seyngkyo, Michelle Bachelet pa wada niya ini baka ka npnsung hiya nTunarac Palic na Sebastian Pinella, wada mtaxa tu1 mwaya balay, Latin America Tu3 qridin Minsweyn Soto. Michelle Bachelet u mniq idas 3 diyax 11 psdhuwan phiyu Soto, 4 knkawas ka diyax iyax qpahun, mniq kngkawas 2010 idas 3 diyax 11 malix qpahun. Mniq malix qpahun cida ka Michelle Bachelet pa, wada mangal hmrinas 80% ka dnkuhan ryu niya. Kngkawas 2010 idas 2 diyax 27, mniq Michelle Bachelet malix qpahun brah mkpiya iyax sngayan cida, muda Knbeyhing Bay Runu Kngkawas 2010 ka pspuruq. Michelle Bachelet mniq kngkawas 2015 Iyappel runu babaw mnuda 1 diyax daw musa homung nniqan qnlqilan. UN Biyax Qqridin Su Kngkawas 2010 idas, UN Misucang Ban Ki moon psdhu Michelle Bachelet ngalan UN Biyax Qridin Su mpseykinin niya. Mntxal tumal Soto Seyngkyo Pusu tyawmu: Kngkawas 2013 Knbeyhing Seyngkyo Chile. Pusu tyawmu: Kngkawas 2013 Knbeyhing Seyngkyo Chile. Kngkawas 2013 spuda dnlulan Tukcka iwil pay, Michelle Bachelet u mntxal tumal Soto seyngkyo. Michelle Bachelet u mniq tumn1 meytaq hyo u ya bay 47% hyo mi muda tumn2 meytaq hyo Dungan, kiya mi mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo cida mangal 62% hyo mi mbiyax mangal Soto. Kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 11, mniq Chile tu2 knbeyhing alang mkbrnux Valparaiso psdhuwan phiyu Soto, mntumal pnsdhu niya u Peru,Ecuador,Mexico, Argentina ,Colombia,Uruguay mi Brazil na qbukung Qnlhangan Weynso uxay daw dayhyo seyhu, kiya ka Chinese Kwocya Cusi Xinjiang Tes, Cyawtong Yunsubu Bucyo Yang. Kngkawas 2015 idas 10 diyax 23 cida, Michelle Bachelet u tuhuy Italian Congri Matteo Renzi mtqita dqras. UN Jncweyn Jimu Kawci Cwanweyn Kngkawas 2018 idas 8 cida, UN u pusa hangan mi psdhu Michelle Bachelet ngalan UN Jncweyn Jimu Kawci Cwanweyn. Kngkawas 2018 idas 9 diyax 10, Michelle Bachelet u dmudu China na kwancaweyn mtmay Xinjiang, kiyami snquri ddaun hiya sblhbun balay. Rmngaw ka Michelle Bachelet pa: 'Pnsliyan UN Jncweyn' u wada ptura pkla Uighur mi duma Muslims u wada phmkuwan kcka Xinjiang Nanminying, smatang ku musa ini biyaw muda pprngaw sediq mpririh seyhu Cyokoku muda mpprngaw ddaun.' Kiya mi Cyokoku u muda pkla kari spruwi qmita ka dmnuwi pusu biyax niya. Kngkawas 2018 idas 9, Michelle Bachelet u wada smriq rmngaw dndulan Sartre u muda pddayak uuda Yemen. Pusa kari ka Michelle Bachelet snquri Saudi Arabia pnquri quri Yemen ssediq muda qmada puniq kndadax baraw na sediq muda seykining. Kngkawas 2015 idas 10 diyax 23 cida, Michelle Bachelet u tuhuy Italian Congri Matteo Renzi mtqita dqras. Kndusan niyaŚÄčšļļÁĒüśīĽ Brah snaw niya Michelle Bachelet ka Jorge Leopoldo D√°valos Cartes, ddha dha u wada ini supu mniq mi ptalax da, Michelle Bachelet u niqan 1 laqi snaw mi 2 laqi qridin niya. Michelle Bachelet pa uxay wana kari Spain ka klaun niya, klaun niya ka kari English mi kari German mi kari French mi kari Portuguese uri.
